aakash-mishra.name: Aakash Mishra
aakash-mishra.one_liner: Meta AI, Stanford CS (MS), prev. Harvard CS (summa cum laude)

aarav-wattal.name: Aarav Wattal
aarav-wattal.one_liner: Stanford EE + CS '27, Majestic Labs AI, prev AMD

abhay-mitra.name: Abhay Mitra
abhay-mitra.one_liner: CEO & Co-Founder, Effective AI (AI agents for insurance actuarial/rating work). Previously Co-Founder & CTO of Nirvana Insurance — built the AI platform from zero, scaled to $1.5B valuation, $260M+ raised (GC, Lightspeed, Valor). Staff Engineer & Platform Lead at Rubrik (pre-IPO, $0→$500M revenue). IIT Delhi CS '16. Co-founder is Kunal Singhal (2x ICPC World Finalist, IOI). San Francisco.

aditi-raghunathan.name: Aditi Raghunathan
tags: spike: ICML 2025 Outstanding Paper + 2026 Sloan + Schmidt AI2050 + 7 Indian-origin PhD students
aditi-raghunathan.one_liner: Assistant Professor, CMU CS + MLD. Stanford CS PhD 2021 under

aditya-gupta.name: Aditya Gupta
aditya-gupta.one_liner: Stanford CS freshman (Class of 2028) and active market maker on Kalshi. Chess National Master (USCF 2200+, age 15). USACO Platinum (perfect Gold score). 5x AIME qualifier. 9 published papers by age 18 across IEEE, Springer, MDPI. Built IB tool acquired by Rogo ($750M valuation, Sequoia-led). First intern at Polymarket (built current fee schedules, liquidity bootstrapping, applied ML via xAI partnership). Built legal tech startup (acq.; backed by Soma, BCV, Lux, YC). Jane Street FTTP 2025, Susquehanna Discovery Days, Citadel Trading Invitational. Jump Trading "Jumper." Percy Liang at SAIL + Columbia (Equivariant Adversarials for LLMs). Founded Chess Pupils (12K+ students). Coca-Cola Scholar, Regeneron STS Scholar. KP Fellow, Greylock X Fellow, F(Lux) Fellow, YC Fellow, Paradigm Fellow, 1517 Medici. TreeHacks Edge Track Grand Prize. Born Delhi, India; raised Rolling Meadows, IL. ~20.

aidan-smith.name: Aidan Smith
aidan-smith.one_liner: Co-founder, Flapping Airplanes ($180M seed, $1.5B valuation, Sequoia + Index + GV). Thiel Fellow 2025 ($200K). Three years at Neuralink building BCI software — while supercommuting to Georgia Tech. Started at Chess.com at 16. Mountain View, CA → the frontier of brain-inspired AI. Mycologist. Ran an untrained marathon.

ajay-jain.name: Ajay Jain
ajay-jain.urgency_reason: DDPM co-author. Genmo CTO. Diffusion-to-video cluster anchor. WndrCo connects to Chonghao.
ajay-jain.next_action: DM @ajayj_ ref Mochi 1 AsymmDiT vs Stable Video Diffusion architecture

akshat-bubna.name: Akshat Bubna
akshat-bubna.one_liner: Co-Founder & CTO of Modal ($1.1B valuation, in talks at $2.5B). First Indian IOI gold medalist ever (2014, Rank 16/311, score 472/600). MIT BS in CS & Mathematics '18. Early engineer & Staff SWE at Scale AI (May 2018–Aug 2021). D.E. Shaw quant intern. Founded Modal with Erik Bernhardsson (ex-Spotify/Better.com CTO) in Aug 2021. Modal: serverless AI infrastructure, ~$50M ARR, ~118 employees, customers include Cognition Labs (Devin), Cursor, Scale AI, Suno, Meta, Mistral, Ramp, Substack. $111M raised from Lux Capital, Redpoint, Amplify. IOI 2013 Bronze. Codeforces Candidate Master (peak 2060). Indian-origin. New Delhi → MIT → NYC. ~28.
akshat-bubna.urgency_reason: First Indian IOI Gold ever. Modal CTO ($1.1B, ~$50M ARR). Already running. Relationship.
akshat-bubna.next_action: Email ref Modal scale + ask for intros to IOI-track founders

alex-gu.name: Alex Gu
alex-gu.one_liner: MIT CS PhD, advised by Armando Solar-Lezama, founding research lead at Math Inc.

alex-shan.name: Alex Shan
alex-shan.urgency_reason: Just raised $32M (May 12). Post-funding window — ~3 weeks before hiring ramp consumes him.
alex-shan.next_action: Congrats DM ref Osiris paper as Manning-lab prelude to judgeval

alex-zhang.name: Alex Zhang
alex-zhang.one_liner: MIT CSAIL PhD (advisors: Omar Khattab, Tim Kraska)

alexi-gladstone.name: Alexi Gladstone
alexi-gladstone.one_liner: UIUC CS PhD (Heng Ji's BLENDER Lab, 2024–2028). NSF Graduate Research Fellow. Invented Energy-Based Transformers (EBTs) — the first architecture to outscale feed-forward transformers, achieving 35% higher scaling rate across data, parameters, and FLOPs. Yann LeCun and Yilun Du on thesis committee. Louis T. Rader Research Award at UVA (1 of 5 from 1,400+ CS undergrads). CDC Accelerated AI Award from Palantir internship. ICML 2025 Top Reviewer. NeurIPS 2022, ICLR 2024, AAAI 2023 publications. Meta Research Scientist Intern. Thesis: cognitively-inspired world models + System 2 thinking.

ally-nakamura.name: Ally Nakamura
ally-nakamura.one_liner: Stealth founder building Catapult (AI agents for medical device workflows). PearX S24. SoftBank Masason Scholar (~166 members globally, ages 9–29). Stanford BS/MS CS (AI). First-author cancer research at NIH at age 18 (published in Cancer Science). Second-author Frontiers in Oncology paper at age 17 (34+ citations). Previously PM at DoNotPay (shipped AI email client covered by Forbes & Wired) and TPM at Instagram/Meta. Thomas Jefferson HS for Science & Technology alum. Japanese-American, originally from DMV/Tokyo. ~24. San Francisco.

ameen-patel.name: Ameen Patel
ameen-patel.one_liner: Member of Technical Staff (LLM Inference) at Prime Intellect. Co-author on INTELLECT-3 — 106B MoE that scores 90.8% AIME 2024 and 88.0% AIME 2025, outperforming DeepSeek's frontier models. Previously Staff ML Engineer at Together AI (inference & serving), 5.5 years as Applied Scientist at Amazon Alexa AI. Co-author on DAS speculative decoding paper with Tri Dao & Percy Liang. Indian-origin. University of Waterloo CS. ~10 years deep in ML infrastructure. San Francisco.

amrith-setlur.name: Amrith Setlur
tags: spike: defined test-time compute scaling paradigm across 7+ papers at top venues in 18 months
amrith-setlur.one_liner: Final-year PhD, CMU Machine Learning (Virginia Smith + Sergey Levine + Aviral Kumar). Defined test-time compute scaling for LLMs — co-first author on e3 (EXAIT Best Paper), first author on process verifiers (ICLR 2025), RL on synthetic data (NeurIPS 2024), and 3 ICML 2025 papers. Built QED-Nano: 4B model matching 120B on Olympiad proofs. JP Morgan AI PhD Fellow (2024) + CMU Presidential Fellow (2025). 20+ papers. Indian-origin.

andrew-ma.name: Andrew Ma
andrew-ma.one_liner: Harvard CSE (SM), prev Jane Street, UVA Alum

anne-ouyang.name: Anne Ouyang
anne-ouyang.one_liner: Co-founder, Standard Kernel Co. Stanford CS PhD (on leave) — Azalia Mirhoseini + Percy Liang. MIT BS+MEng. Ex-NVIDIA cuDNN. KernelBench creator. USACO Finalist '18. PicoCTF 6th place. Building the compiler for the AI hardware stack.

archer-wang.name: Archer Wang
archer-wang.one_liner: MIT CS PhD (started 2024), MIT BS '23 + MEng '24

arjun-karanam.name: Arjun Karanam
arjun-karanam.one_liner: Stanford CS (MS, AI track), Stanford HAI

asher-spector.name: Asher Spector
asher-spector.one_liner: Co-founder, Flapping Airplanes ($180M seed, $1.5B valuation). Statistics PhD at Stanford (Emmanuel Candès, Barnum-Simons Chair). NSF + Citadel GQS Fellow. Harvard '21 — Hoopes Prize, Stats Prize, North American Debate Champion. Horace Mann '17. ~142 citations. Published in Annals of Statistics, JASA, JRSSB, J. Political Economy, Financial Analysts Journal. Ships theory as software: knockpy, pyblip, blipr, mosaicperm. ~26. Father: Alfred Spector (ex-Google VP Research, Two Sigma CTO).

avanika-narayan.name: Avanika Narayan
avanika-narayan.one_liner: Rox (Co-Founder/AI), Stanford CS PhD, Knight-Hennessy Scholar

ayush-alag.name: Ayush Alag
ayush-alag.one_liner: OpenAI, prev Stanford MS CS, Princeton BS

baris-akis.name: Baris Akis
tags: spike: invented "talent engineering" as a category — fusing VC, recruiting, and career agency into one firm
baris-akis.one_liner: Co-Founder & President of Human Capital. Head of Talent Engineering at xAI. Built the "CAA for engineers" — a hybrid VC firm and talent agency that wrote the first check into Brex and backed 15 pre-unicorns. Turkish immigrant who got blocked from DOGE for being a non-citizen.

benjamin-spector.name: Benjamin F Spector
benjamin-spector.one_liner: Co-founder, Flapping Airplanes ($180M seed, $1.5B valuation, Sequoia + Index + GV). Hertz Fellow ($250K). Stanford CS PhD (Chris Ré lab, Hazy Research). MIT SB+MEng (Tim Kraska). Horace Mann '18. Created ThunderKittens (3,200☆ GitHub, ICLR 2025 Spotlight), Halite (6,000 players, ACM Cutler-Bell Prize), and Prod — the 501(c)(3) behind Cursor, Mercor, Etched, Decart. ~540 citations. Father: Alfred Spector (ex-Google VP Research, Two Sigma CTO). Cellist, pilot. Makes ML go brr.

brandon-wang.name: Brandon Wang
tags: spike: IMO Gold + 3x USAMO Winner + H-Net 2nd author + Cartesia→onepot pivot
brandon-wang.urgency_reason: Recent departure Cartesia → onepot AI. IMO Gold + 3x USAMO + Putnam solo solver.
brandon-wang.next_action: DM @fluorane — H-Net dynamic chunking question + chemistry SMILES angle

brian-huang.name: Brian Huang
brian-huang.one_liner: Google DeepMind, MIT (BS Math + BS CS&E + MS CS), prev Haize Labs

brooke-joseph.name: Brooke Joseph
brooke-joseph.one_liner: OpenAI (Member of Technical Staff), University of Waterloo (CS)

cameron-fink.name: Cameron Fink
cameron-fink.one_liner: Co-founder & CEO, Aaru (AI synthetic audiences, $1B valuation, Dec 2025). Dartmouth dropout. 19 at founding. $50M+ Series A led by Redpoint. RSI · Kleiner Perkins · Z Fellows. Predicted NY Democratic primary within 371 votes. Davos 2026 speaker. Mentored by Frank Luntz. Self-taught programmer. "Simulation tests what will happen next."

chenglei-si.name: Chenglei Si
chenglei-si.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD (advised by Diyi Yang and Tatsu Hashimoto)

chris-rinard.name: Chris Rinard
chris-rinard.one_liner: Co-founder, Standard Kernel Co. Stanford Computer Systems PhD (on leave). MIT CS BS+MEng — TA for 6.172 Performance Engineering. ALIA-250 flight controls (safety-critical embedded systems). Failed Web3 startup ($1M raised). Now writing CUDA kernels that beat PyTorch on Blackwell GPUs.

cory-levy.name: Cory Levy
tags: spike: network-as-product — turned campus-by-campus grind into a scalable talent discovery engine producing unicorns
cory-levy.one_liner: Founder, Z Fellows ($10K @ $1B cap, <1% acceptance, 500+ alumni). Co-founder, After School (20M users, $16.4M Series A, acquired by Ancestry). Forbes 30 Under 30 2x. 54+ angel investments (Hebbia $700M, Whop $280M+, Aaru ~$1B, Owner.com $1B, Novig $500M, Vise $128M). Interned at Founders Fund in high school. Tweeted at Keith Rabois at 19, got $1M. Grinds campus-by-campus across 25+ universities to find founders before anyone else sees them. Built Silicon Valley's most efficient young-founder on-ramp — not by sitting in SF, but by showing up.

cristobal-valenzuela.name: Cristóbal Valenzuela Barrera
tags: spike: art-school-thesis → $3B AI company that defined generative video
cristobal-valenzuela.one_liner: Co-founder & CEO of Runway ($3B+ valuation). Chilean immigrant who studied economics, taught design, then built the company behind Stable Diffusion and the world's first commercial AI video generator. His NYU thesis became a $3B company. TIME100 AI. Oscar-winning VFX. ml5.js creator. The artist-CEO who made generative video real before OpenAI or Google shipped theirs.

damian-ho.name: Damian Ho
damian-ho.one_liner: Stanford CS (MS), prev CMU, HRT, Jump Trading

dan-biderman.name: Dan Biderman
dan-biderman.one_liner: Stanford postdoc co-advised by Chris Ré (Hazy Research — the most prolific founder-factory lab in ML) and Scott Linderman. Lead author of "LoRA Learns Less and Forgets Less" (TMLR 2024, Featured Certification). Co-author of Minions (ICML 2025 — 5.7x cost reduction, 97.9% frontier performance via local-cloud LLM collaboration). PhD Columbia Neurobiology (Titus M. Cowan Prize). Academic partner, Databricks Mosaic AI Research. Adi Lautman Program alumnus (Tel Aviv University — 15 admits/year). Israeli-origin.

daniel-zeng.name: Daniel Zeng
daniel-zeng.one_liner: Genesis Molecular AI (Senior ML Research Engineer), prev. Stanford MSCS, UC Berkeley

devansh-pandey.name: Devansh Pandey
devansh-pandey.one_liner: Co-founder, Standard Intelligence (si.inc). Atlas Fellowship's first employee — dropped out of high school to build it. Oxford (Bread Society founder, Taylor Swift Society). Ran a weeklong hackathon in rural Japan. Now pretraining models that learn like humans.

devendra-chaplot.name: Devendra Singh Chaplot
devendra-chaplot.one_liner: Embodied AI pioneer. Mistral AI co-founder. Founding team at Thinking Machines Lab. Now at xAI & SpaceX. Built agents that see, navigate, and manipulate the physical world — then trained the LLMs that power Europe's top AI lab.

devvrit-khatri.name: Devvrit Khatri
devvrit-khatri.one_liner: Joining Reflection AI ($2B raised, $8B valuation, targeting $25B) as Member of Technical Staff. UT Austin CS PhD (Inderjit Dhillon). MatFormer (NeurIPS 2024, Best Paper ENLSP@NeurIPS 2023). DiskANN (NeurIPS 2019 — powers billion-scale vector search at Microsoft Bing). Led 400K+ GPU-hour RL scaling study (ICLR 2026 Oral). 12+ papers across NeurIPS, ICLR, APPROX. Previously Google Research (3 yr w/ Prateek Jain), Meta (w/ Rishabh Agarwal), Microsoft Research India. BITS Pilani, Institute Bronze Medal. Indian.
devvrit-khatri.urgency_reason: Joining Reflection AI ($2B) — vesting cliff begins immediately. Last pre-lockup window.
devvrit-khatri.next_action: Meet before Reflection start date; ref ScaleRL co-authorship pattern

divy-thakkar.name: Divy Thakkar
tags: spike: MBA + PhD researcher who built Google's AI research footprint in India and deploys life-saving AI at scale
divy-thakkar.one_liner: Staff Program Manager & Researcher, Google DeepMind. Founding member of both Google Research India and DeepMind India. Leads strategic research engagements for Gemini. CHI 2025 Best Paper. IAAI 2023 Best Innovative Application (SAHELI — 130K+ maternal health beneficiaries). PhD (London, funded by Google) + MBA (IIFT). DA-IICT '15. Angel investor & advisor. ~32.

dylan-reid.name: Dylan Reid
tags: spike: operator-to-investor arc — ran a global entrepreneur society (Kairos) across 5 continents, built a government startup program in Chile, founded a 3D printing company with MIT Media Lab's former director, and pivoted into AI-native bio investing before it was consensus
dylan-reid.one_liner: Managing Director, Zetta Venture Partners. Former CEO of the Kairos Society (global entrepreneur community across 5 continents). Director of Business Development at Startup Chile / CORFO. Co-founder & CEO of Matter.io (3D printing / digital manufacturing, acquired by Junction). Forbes 30 Under 30 — Manufacturing & Industry (2015, inaugural year of the category). Founded PopShop LLC (Ithaca's first makerspace) and Cornell Made while still a student. Cornell AAP '12, Computational Design. Now investing in "latent sciences" — AI-native biotech, oncology, and computational biology at the earliest stages. Board observer at Noetik, Nabla Bio, Faro Health, Nanite. 15K+ LinkedIn followers.

elijah-kurien.name: Elijah Kurien
elijah-kurien.one_liner: Cursor (Anysphere), prev Dorm Room Fund Managing Partner, Waterloo SE

emily-han.name: Emily Han
emily-han.one_liner: Modal (Member of Technical Staff), Stanford CS (on leave)

eric-han.name: Eric Han
eric-han.one_liner: OpenAI, prev Meta AI, MS Stanford EE, BS Caltech

eric-zhang.name: Eric Zhang
eric-zhang.one_liner: University of Waterloo (Software Engineering), prev Suno AI

etash-guha.name: Etash Guha
etash-guha.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD, advised by Ludwig Schmidt and Yejin Choi

fan-pu-zeng.name: Fan Pu Zeng
fan-pu-zeng.one_liner: Jane Street, prev CMU CS (BS + MS)

galen-mead.name: Galen Mead
galen-mead.one_liner: Founder & CEO, Standard Intelligence (si.inc). Atlas Fellow. Building an aligned AGI lab from bare metal — 30 PB data clusters, open-source audio models, and the first general computer action model. All before most people finish undergrad.

gashon-hussein.name: Gashon Hussein
gashon-hussein.one_liner: Researcher at Physical Intelligence ($5.6B–$11B valuation). Co-author on π*0.6 (VLA that learns from experience via RL). Led NVIDIA/Stanford collaboration on test-time training for one-minute video generation (CVPR 2025, 34 Elo lead). Co-author on CyBench (ICLR 2025 Oral, adopted by US/UK AISI). Stanford BS CS '25. Worked with Yu Sun (TTT), Jure Leskovec, and Percy Liang. Neo Scholar. 4 papers in ~18 months. ~23.

gauri-gupta.name: Gauri Gupta
gauri-gupta.one_liner: Founder & CEO of NeoSigma (custom evaluation + post-training for real-world AI agents). MIT Media Lab PhD dropout (advisor: Ramesh Raskar, Camera Culture group). IIT Delhi BTech+MTech Mathematics & Computing (~2022). Prev: Parallel Web Systems (Parag Agrawal's $100M AI startup — built Basis, their evidence-grounding system). Apple MLR intern (Samy Bengio's team, multi-modal foundation models). O-1 visa approved Dec 2025. US Patent (Adobe). ~300 citations across AAAI, ICLR, ICML, AAMAS. Charpak Lab Research Scholar. Indian-origin, from Delhi.

grace-lam.name: Grace Lam
grace-lam.one_liner: Character.AI (Researcher), prev Palantir, NVIDIA, DeepMind, BAIR

grace-li.name: Grace Li
grace-li.one_liner: Design Arena / Arcada Labs (CEO & Co-Founder), Harvard CS & Neuroscience

hamza-mostafa.name: Hamza Mostafa
hamza-mostafa.one_liner: University of Waterloo CS, prev OpenAI

haneul-shin.name: Haneul Shin
haneul-shin.one_liner: Jane Street (Quantitative Trader), Harvard CS + Math '23

hannah-gao.name: Hannah Gao
hannah-gao.one_liner: Stanford Math + CS '28, OpenAI connection, SAIL

hersh-godse.name: Hersh Godse
hersh-godse.one_liner: Amazon AGI Autonomy, prev Adept AI

hima-tammineedi.name: Hima Tammineedi
hima-tammineedi.one_liner: Forge (Founding Team), prev. CMU ML, Schwarzman Scholar

himanshu-gaurav-singh.name: Himanshu Gaurav Singh
tags: spike: JEE Advanced AIR 2 + IJSO Gold + APhO Silver + 4 INOs — one of the most decorated Indian competition profiles feeding into frontier AI robotics
himanshu-gaurav-singh.one_liner: PhD student at Berkeley AI Research, dual-advised by Pieter Abbeel AND Jitendra Malik — the two most prolific robotics-to-startup advisor lineages in AI. Building robot learning from human videos: learns manipulation priors from in-the-wild video, then transfers zero-shot to robot embodiments. JEE Advanced AIR 2 (2019, 340/372, top 2 of 161,319). IJSO Gold 2016. APhO Silver 2018. KVPY Fellow. 4 Indian National Olympiads. IIT Delhi CS. ICRA 2025. EMNLP 2023. Quant intern at Tower Research Capital. Indian-origin (Gorakhpur, UP). ~24.

isaac-fung.name: Isaac Fung
isaac-fung.one_liner: Anthropic (Member of Technical Staff), prev OpenAI

isaac-ong.name: Isaac Ong
isaac-ong.one_liner: Anthropic (Member of Technical Staff), UC Berkeley (Graduate Researcher, RISE Lab/LMSYS)

ishaan-javali.name: Ishaan Javali
ishaan-javali.one_liner: NeurIPS 2025 Best Paper winner (as an undergraduate). Princeton CS, summa cum laude, Class of 2025. Co-authored "1000 Layer Networks for Self-Supervised RL" — proved RL depth-scaling works, 2–50x gains. ISEF 1st Category winner (2021). Plano East valedictorian. Two Sigma quant intern. YC S25 co-founder (Parachute, clinical AI). Now engineer at Datacurve (YC, $15M Series A). Indian-origin, Plano TX. ~22.

ishan-khare.name: Ishan Khare
tags: spike: Hazy + 2 NeurIPS + ICLR + Regeneron STS + RSI + high-school first-author DFT paper
ishan-khare.one_liner: Stanford CS MS student (2024–2026), BS CS with distinction '25 (GPA 4.04/4.0, Tau Beta Pi, Phi Beta Kappa). Research with Chris Ré at

jaeyeon-kim.name: Jaeyeon Kim
jaeyeon-kim.one_liner: 2nd-year Harvard CS PhD (advised by Sitan Chen + Sham Kakade). ICML 2025 Outstanding Paper Award (1 of 6 from 12,000 submissions) for masked diffusion theory. 2 ICML orals in first year of PhD. IMO finalist (South Korea). SNU BS Math (perfect GPA in all math courses). 11 papers, ~200 citations by year 2 of PhD. Building the theoretical foundations for masked diffusion models — the leading alternative to autoregressive generation. Korean.

jayesh-singla.name: Jayesh Singla
jayesh-singla.one_liner: Skild AI, MS CS CMU, IIT Bombay CSE

jeffrey-ma.name: Jeffrey Ma
jeffrey-ma.one_liner: Harvard CS PhD (advised by Vijay Janapa Reddi)

jerry-tworek.name: Jaroslaw "Jerry" Tworek
tags: spike: shipped Codex, Copilot, ChatGPT, GPT-4, o1, o3, GPT-5 — arguably the strongest individual contribution record in AI over the past 7 years
jerry-tworek.one_liner: Founder & CEO, Core Automation. Previously VP of Research at OpenAI (2019–Jan 2026, 7 years). Known internally as "Father of Reasoning Models" (o1/o3) and "Father of Code" (Codex). Built Codex, Copilot, ChatGPT, GPT-4, o1, o3, GPT-5. 47K+ citations. Math degree + 5 years quant trading + 7 years frontier AI. Polish, in SF. ~42.

jessie-jia-guo.name: Jessie Jia Guo
jessie-jia-guo.one_liner: Investment Partner at Next Legacy ($3.5B AUM mission-driven fund-of-funds, Palo Alto). Co-leads Emerging Leaders Fund ($1–5M checks into emerging managers, 12–15 relationships per fund). 10+ years at the firm (since 2014). Kauffman Fellow (Class 23, mentored by Jenny Lee of GGV). Board member, Bridge Funding Global. Prior: CICC (pioneered fund-of-funds business) + China Renaissance (tech startup capital raising). Peking University + UC Davis MBA. LP prospect for inception-stage AI fund.
jessie-jia-guo.urgency_reason: Next Legacy Emerging Leaders Fund: exact $1-5M emerging-manager fit.
jessie-jia-guo.next_action: Request introductory LP meeting — lead with clarity-of-purpose framing

jimmy-ba.name: Jimmy Lei Ba
tags: spike: co-authored Adam + LayerNorm — literally inside every LLM. PhD under Nobel laureate. Built Grok at 200K GPU scale
jimmy-ba.one_liner: xAI co-founder (departed Feb 10, 2026). Associate Professor with tenure, University of Toronto (on leave). PhD under Geoffrey Hinton (2024 Nobel laureate). CIFAR AI Chair. Sloan Research Fellow 2023. Co-authored Adam optimizer and Layer Normalization — two components inside every LLM on Earth. 313K+ citations. Canadian, now in SF. ~36.

john-cole-kessler.name: John Cole Kessler
john-cole-kessler.one_liner: Co-founder & CTO, Aaru (AI synthetic audiences, $1B valuation). Was 15 at founding — currently 16–17. MIT Media Lab · Cerebras Systems · Kleiner Perkins, all before age 15. Z Fellows. Led Potato's $4.5M seed. Built a multi-agent system of ~5,000 AI agents that predicted the NY primary within 371 votes. New York.

john-rho.name: John Rho
john-rho.one_liner: Datacurve (Member of Technical Staff), prev. Harvard Statistics & CS

john-yang.name: John Yang
john-yang.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD (advisors: Ludwig Schmidt, Diyi Yang)

jon-saad-falcon.name: Jon Saad-Falcon
jon-saad-falcon.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD + MBA (advised by Azalia Mirhoseini and Christopher Re)

jonathan-mengedoht.name: Jonathan Mengedoht
jonathan-mengedoht.one_liner: Jane Street (prev. Technical University of Munich)

josh-sirota.name: Josh Sirota
tags: spike: non-technical GTM founder built $100M enterprise AI company in 7 months
josh-sirota.one_liner: Founder & CEO, Eragon AI ($12M at $100M valuation, a16z Speedrun SR005). "Software is dead" — prompt-driven AI OS replacing Salesforce, Snowflake, Tableau, Jira. Oracle + Salesforce GTM → quarter-life crisis → SF loft across from Oracle Park → $100M in ~7 months. Penn State. Hockey goalie (ACHA D2). Armonk, NY. Arielle Zuckerberg led. 29.

kanishk-gandhi.name: Kanishk Gandhi
tags: spike: 2x CoLM Oral 1st author + Goodman lab + TinyZero lead + STaR-lineage in title of his paper
kanishk-gandhi.urgency_reason: Stanford Goodman lab. Lead researcher on Countdown task R1-Zero used. IIT Kanpur.
kanishk-gandhi.next_action: DM @gandhikanishk ref Cognitive Behaviors incorrect-priming finding

karan-dalal.name: Karan Dalal
tags: spike: core architect of TTT layers — a new sequence modeling primitive that replaces RNN hidden states with neural networks, published at ICML + CVPR 2025
karan-dalal.one_liner: Lead author, One-Minute Video Generation with Test-Time Training (CVPR 2025, 2.4k GitHub stars). Core member of the TTT group — co-authored all 4 major TTT papers including TTT-Linear/MLP (ICML 2025, 454+ stars), TTT-E2E for long context (570 stars), and TTT-Discover. UC Berkeley EECS researcher + Stanford SAIL. Previously co-founded Otto (pet-tech, $1.6M raised at 17, shut down). Indian-origin. ~22. Cupertino, CA.

karthik-balaji-ganesh.name: Karthik Balaji Ganesh
karthik-balaji-ganesh.one_liner: Databricks, prev Google, CMU, IIT Hyderabad

karun-ram.name: Karun Ram
karun-ram.one_liner: Quantitative Researcher, Optiver (Delta One / Futures). Dartmouth '25 Salutatorian (3.99+ GPA) — Math + CS double major. Phi Beta Kappa. Neukom Prize. Sophomore Science Prize (CS). Honors thesis: machine-certified formal verification of concurrent Union-Find in TLA+ (Siddhartha Jayanti). TA'd Algorithms, Discrete Math, Randomized Algorithms — CS Teaching Award. Graduate-level citations in Randomized Algorithms, Data Stream Algorithms, Information Theory. From Chennai, India (AISC). ~22.

kawin-ethayarajh.name: Kawin Ethayarajh
tags: spike: created KTO — replaced DPO as default alignment method at multiple frontier labs, needs only binary signal not preference pairs
kawin-ethayarajh.one_liner: Assistant Professor of Applied AI at UChicago Booth (Kathryn & Grant Swick Faculty Scholar). Created KTO (Kahneman-Tversky Optimization) — ICML 2024 Spotlight (top 3.5%), now industry-standard alignment method integrated into models with hundreds of millions of downloads. Created Stanford Human Preferences (SHP) — sole academic dataset used in Llama-2 post-training. ICML 2022 Outstanding Paper Award. Meta Fellowship 2021. PhD Stanford (Dan Jurafsky). BSc/MSc UofT (4.0 GPA, John H. Moss Scholar — top graduating award). Princeton PLI postdoc. Visiting Researcher at Contextual AI. ~3,200+ citations. Indian-origin (Sri Lankan Tamil). ~29.
kawin-ethayarajh.urgency_reason: Created KTO. UChicago Booth prof. 3,200+ cites. Research collaboration angle.
kawin-ethayarajh.next_action: Email ref KTO vs DPO commercial deployment question

kevin-lu.name: Kevin Lu
tags: spike: co-invented Decision Transformer (1,951 citations) — the paper that reframed RL as sequence modeling and seeded the reasoning-model paradigm
kevin-lu.one_liner: Researcher at Thinking Machines Lab (Mira Murati, $2B seed, $12B valuation). Led the team that shipped GPT-4o-mini at OpenAI in 3 months; contributed to o1-mini and o3. Co-author of Decision Transformer (1,951 citations, 323 highly influential — reframed RL as sequence modeling). "Pretrained Transformers as Universal Computation Engines" (228 citations, AAAI 2022, first author — as an undergrad). Previously HRT AI Labs, Meta AI (FAIR). UC Berkeley under Pieter Abbeel & Igor Mordatch. GitHub: 5,300+ stars across 2 repos. Delta Fellow. ~25.

khush-gupta.name: Khush Gupta
khush-gupta.one_liner: University of Pennsylvania (Jerome Fisher M&T Program — BS CS, BS Statistics, MS CS), Together AI

kshitij-sodani.name: Kshitij Sodani
kshitij-sodani.one_liner: 5x IOI medalist (2x Gold, 2x Silver, 1x Bronze). Only Indian with 5 consecutive IOI medals. Youngest-ever IOI gold medalist (age 17, 2023). Codeforces International Grandmaster (peak 2736). Global Rank 1 Google Kickstart. Founder of Algoplanet (900+ mentees, 30+ countries). MIT CS & Math '28. Published applied cryptography research (MIT CSAIL, Spring 2025). Originally from Gurugram; schooled in Kota, Rajasthan. ~20 years old.

kunal-singhal.name: Kunal Singhal
kunal-singhal.one_liner: CTO & Co-Founder, Effective AI (AI agents for insurance, backed by Lightspeed & Valor). 2x ACM-ICPC World Finalist (2015, 2016 — represented India from IIT Delhi). IOI 2012 (India team). INMO 2012 topper. Competitive Programming Hall of Fame (TopCoder: knsn1994). Previously: Facebook, Monzo (Tech Lead), Grammarly (Tech Lead & Manager), WisdomAI (Founding Engineer, $73M raised from Kleiner/NVIDIA). Co-founder Abhay Mitra built Nirvana Insurance from 0 → $1.5B. They first co-founded together at IIT Delhi in 2015. Indian-origin. Based in SF Bay Area.

kunvar-thaman.name: Kunvar Thaman
tags: spike: solo-authored ICML 2026 on agent reward hacking + BITS Pilani independent path + Manifund-funded mech interp + Standard Intelligence + incoming MIT PhD
kunvar-thaman.urgency_reason: Solo ICML 2026. Indian. Standard Intelligence ML eng + incoming MIT PhD. Rare profile.
kunvar-thaman.next_action: Email kunvar@mechinterp.com ref RHB +13.3pp DeepSeek sibling-comparison

laker-newhouse.name: Laker Newhouse
laker-newhouse.one_liner: Co-creator of Muon, the optimizer now used to train trillion-parameter LLMs (Kimi K2, GLM-4.5, INTELLECT-3). MIT Math '25, MEng EECS '25. Thesis unified Adam/Shampoo/Muon via modular duality. NeurIPS 2023 paper (quantum + tensor networks). ThunderKittens kernel work (1510 vs 774 TFLOPS on H100). ICML 2025 paper on Lipschitz transformers. Phillip Isola & Jeremy Bernstein advisors. Founded Khan Academy for Ukraine. Based in SF Bay Area. ~23.

lawrence-jang.name: Lawrence Jang
lawrence-jang.one_liner: CMU ML PhD (incoming), Visiting Researcher at Meta (Llama Computer Agents)

leonard-tang.name: Leonard Tang
leonard-tang.one_liner: Haize Labs (Co-founder & CEO), Harvard University (BS CS + Math)

liam-mcnamara.name: Liam McNamara
tags: spike: median Canadian pre-med to 7-figure ARR cybersecurity founder in one year, age 18
liam-mcnamara.one_liner: Founder & CEO, Cybe (YC W26, kernel-level DLP, 7-figure ARR in 2 months). Co-founder, Matrix Biotech (at-home multi-marker hormone test, $5/5min). Z Fellow. Dropped out of Queen's University pre-med at ~18. Built the first DL model to predict stroke recovery from fMRI. Only undergrad in a Nobel Prize-winning lab (100 faculty). Teaching at MIT during last year of high school. From a town of 32K in Canada. ~19.

lillian-sun.name: Lillian Sun
lillian-sun.one_liner: Harvard junior doing concurrent BS (CS + Statistics) and MS (CS), graduating 2026. First-author ICML 2025 workshop oral on weak-to-strong trustworthiness in LLMs — as an undergrad, with Himabindu Lakkaraju's group. Two ICML 2025 workshop papers total. Interned at Two Sigma (SWE, 2023), HRT (winter 2024, algo dev summer 2025 — trained diffusion models and LLM-based trading strategies on HAIL team). Officer at Harvard Undergraduate Quantitative Traders. USAMO qualifier, AIME, Math Prize for Girls. INTEGIRLS DC Co-President. Recently joined a16z crypto (engineering, data, fund strategy). Chinese-origin. Falls Church, VA. ~21.

lisa-dunlap.name: Lisa Dunlap
lisa-dunlap.one_liner: UC Berkeley EECS PhD (advisors: Joseph Gonzalez, Trevor Darrell)

lovish-madaan.name: Lovish Madaan
lovish-madaan.one_liner: PhD candidate, Meta Superintelligence Labs (MSL) + UCL NLP. Core contributor to
lovish-madaan.urgency_reason: Meta MSL + UCL PhD. JEE AIR 124. Llama 3 contributor. ScaleRL co-author.
lovish-madaan.next_action: Email ref ScaleRL recipe + PDR +11% AIME finding

luke-melas-kyriazi.name: Luke Melas-Kyriazi
luke-melas-kyriazi.one_liner: Training coding LLMs at Cursor/Anysphere ($29.3B). Rhodes Scholar (2020). Oxford DPhil in CS under Andrea Vedaldi (VGG). Harvard BA (Math) + MS (CS) — took Math 55, Phi Beta Kappa Junior 24. Published in NEJM. 1,625 citations, h-index 19 across 24+ papers. EfficientNet-PyTorch: 8,200+ GitHub stars. Jane Street quant trading intern. Managed $1.2M reserve fund as Treasurer of Harvard Student Agencies. Hunter College High School (K–12, NYC). Brother John Melas-Kyriazi is CEO of Standard Metrics (ex-Spark Capital). ~28.

matthew-yang.name: Matthew Yang
matthew-yang.one_liner: Just-graduated CMU MS in Machine Learning (Aviral Kumar's AIRe Lab). Defined the test-time compute scaling frontier for LLMs — co-equal first author on MRT (ICML 2025) and e3 (ICLR 2026 + EXAIT Best Paper), first author on InT (ICLR 2026). Built the best known <2B reasoning model on AIME '25. CRA Outstanding Undergrad Research Finalist (top 24 in North America). Canadian Math Olympiad top 50. Waterloo CS (94/100 GPA). CMU ML (4.18/4.33 GPA). Scale AI + Skild AI industry experience. ~24. Canadian.

maxwell-jones.name: Maxwell Jones
maxwell-jones.one_liner: CMU ML PhD (advised by Jun-Yan Zhu and Ruslan Salakhutdinov)

mayank-mishra.name: Mayank Mishra
tags: spike: IBM Granite pretraining lead + Tri Dao/Gonzalez/Stoica advising + sole author of lm-engine
mayank-mishra.one_liner: 1st-year EECS PhD, UC Berkeley (Aug 2025–), co-advised by
mayank-mishra.urgency_reason: LinkedIn shows 'Stealth AI Startup' alongside Berkeley PhD — active signal.
mayank-mishra.next_action: DM @MayankMish98 — ask what he's building, ref lm-engine

mei.name: Mei Z.
tags: spike: first investor in 5 AI infra companies now collectively worth $6B+
mei.one_liner: AI pre-seed investor with extraordinary formation-stage deal access. First check into Standard Intelligence, Etched (now $5B), MatX ($500M Series B), RadixArk (SGLang spinout, $400M), and Mirendil (ex-Anthropic, $1B). MIT dropout, Kavli Institute astrophysics + Media Lab research background. Chinese-American. Pattern: she gets in FIRST at pre-seed for the best AI infrastructure/hardware companies before anyone else sees them. Not a founder prospect — a co-investor and scout who sees formation-stage deals 12–24 months early.

michael-wornow.name: Michael Wornow
michael-wornow.one_liner: Co-Founder of Kinetic Systems (kineticsystems.ai) — computer-use agents for healthcare workflow automation. Stanford CS PhD (2020–2025) co-advised by Chris Ré (Hazy Research) and Nigam Shah. 1,874 citations. Published in Nature Medicine (MedHELM), ICLR 2025, NeurIPS 2023/2024/2025, VLDB 2024, NEJM AI. Created EHRSHOT (first public longitudinal EHR benchmark, NeurIPS 2023) and ECLAIR (enterprise automation framework). NSF + Stanford HAI Fellow. Harvard summa cum laude (CS + Statistics, Phi Beta Kappa). Previously Broad Institute (David Liu lab), Microsoft Research, insitro. Delta Fellow.
michael-wornow.urgency_reason: Kinetic Systems actively hiring → in build/fundraise mode.
michael-wornow.next_action: Send 2-3 specific candidates from pipeline (offer value first)

neel-guha.name: Neel Guha
tags: spike: JD + PhD (Ré) + LegalBench author + NEJM + PNAS + Wharton job-market track

neel-nanda.name: Neel Nanda
tags: spike: reverse-engineering neural networks from first principles
neel-nanda.one_liner: Mechanistic Interpretability Team Lead at Google DeepMind. Double IMO Gold Medalist. The person trying to reverse-engineer what neural networks have learned.

neel-redkar.name: Neel Redkar
neel-redkar.one_liner: UCLA CS & Philosophy (4.0). Standard Intelligence. Davidson Fellow ($25K, AI for carbon capture). NeurIPS '23 at 18 (independent, EV-funded). SineRider lead dev (recruited by 3Blue1Brown). ISEF 2nd Place + 3 Special Awards. Youngest Notion AI intern. $80K+ raised for hackathons. San Ramon → SF. Baking function approximators.

neil-kale.name: Neil Kale
neil-kale.one_liner: CMU Machine Learning (MS), prev Scale AI SEAL, prev Worcester Polytechnic Institute

nikita-mounier.name: Nikita Mounier
nikita-mounier.one_liner: Penn M&T '27 (UPenn CS + Wharton), prev Ramp, Rox, Thrive Capital

niklas-muennighoff.name: Niklas Muennighoff
niklas-muennighoff.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD (Knight-Hennessy Scholar, 1st year). ~23,500 citations at age ~25. Created MTEB (6M+ installs, used by OpenAI/Google/Meta). Built s1 — replicated o1-preview reasoning for <$50 (6.6K GitHub stars). Led OLMoE (first fully open MoE LLM, ICLR 2025). Best Paper ACL 2023, Outstanding Runner-Up NeurIPS 2023, Best Paper ICLR AGI Workshop. Peking University BA (top of class). Research intern at Meta FAIR (Jun 2025–). German. Speaks 5 languages including Japanese (JLPT N1) and Mandarin.

niloofar-mireshghallah.name: Niloofar Mireshghallah
niloofar-mireshghallah.one_liner: Humans& (Member of Technical Staff), Carnegie Mellon University (incoming Assistant Professor, Fall 2026)

nina-boord.name: Nina Boord
nina-boord.one_liner: Stanford BS Math + MS CS (Phi Beta Kappa), Cogent Security, prev Nuro

parsa-idehpour.name: Parsa Idehpour

patrick-wang.name: Patrick Wang
patrick-wang.one_liner: Voyage AI (acquired by MongoDB), CMU Database Group

pushmeet-kohli.name: Pushmeet Kohli
pushmeet-kohli.one_liner: VP of Research & Head of AI for Science at Google DeepMind. The person behind AlphaFold, AlphaEvolve, SynthID, and Co-Scientist. TIME 100 AI.

rahul-ravishankar.name: Rahul Ravishankar
tags: spike: 2 top-venue papers (CVPR + ICCV 2025) as Berkeley undergrad, shipped Grok 3.5 pretraining at xAI, left 2 weeks after co-author
rahul-ravishankar.one_liner: Recently departed xAI (Feb 13, 2026). Worked on Grok 3.5 pretraining and v7 multimodal kickoff. Co-author CVPR 2025 (diffusion scaling laws) and ICCV 2025 (TOTO: autoregressive video pre-training on 1T+ visual tokens). Berkeley CS under Jitendra Malik. TA'd CS 170 three semesters. UCSF Brain Lab research (MRI clustering). Left xAI two weeks after Zeeshan Patel — strong co-founding signal. Indian-origin. Fremont, CA. ~22.

rishabh-tiwari.name: Rishabh Tiwari
tags: spike: ICLR first-author as undergrad + DeepMind 2yr + Keutzer/SqueezeAI + Apple-amplified SOTA
rishabh-tiwari.one_liner: 2nd-year EECS PhD, UC Berkeley / BAIR, advised by Kurt Keutzer (SqueezeAILab). First-author ICLR paper (ChipNet) as a 2nd-year undergrad at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. 2 years Pre-Doctoral Researcher at Google DeepMind with Pradeep Shenoy (ICML 2023, WACV 2024, AAAI 2023). QuantSpec (first author, 2025) — self-speculative decoding with 4-bit hierarchical KV cache, ~2.5x speedup, >90% acceptance, featured on Apple ML Research. Currently Research Scientist Intern at Meta (2026). Youngest Indian Kaggle Competitions Master (age 18, 2020). Indian, IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Dept. Rank 2.
rishabh-tiwari.urgency_reason: Berkeley/Keutzer. QuantSpec on Apple ML Research page. ScaleRL co-author. RS intern Meta.
rishabh-tiwari.next_action: Email ref QuantSpec ~2.5x speedup + 90% acceptance rate

ritvik-kapila.name: Ritvik Kapila
tags: spike: built 24T token pre-training dataset at Essential AI under Transformer inventor Ashish Vaswani, now co-founding NeoSigma

ritvik-singh.name: Ritvik Singh
tags: spike: built NVIDIA's robot sim stack (ORBIT/Isaac Lab) + first RGB-only dexterous grasping with 93% real-world success
ritvik-singh.one_liner: PhD student at UC Berkeley (Pieter Abbeel + Jitendra Malik). First author on DextrAH-RGB — first sim-to-real RGB-only dexterous grasping system. Co-authored ORBIT/Isaac Lab (6.8k GitHub stars, NVIDIA's standard robotics sim framework). DeXtreme (ICRA 2023), Synthetica (IROS 2025), Fast-Grasp'D (IROS 2023). 855 Google Scholar citations. Previously NVIDIA Robotics. Indian-origin.

rohan-jain.name: Rohan Jain
rohan-jain.one_liner: Carnegie Mellon University CS, incoming DRW

rohan-kalahasty.name: Rohan Kalahasty
rohan-kalahasty.one_liner: Co-Founder & CEO of a37 (applied37) — building Forge, the first AI-native DevOps workspace. Caltech Physics dropout (left ~Feb 2025). 2nd-time founder (Vytal raised $1.3M at $12.5M valuation in high school). 3x USABO qualifier. USACO Gold. 2024 Regeneron STS Scholar. TJHSST valedictorian. Founded International Biology Bowl. Published 3 papers at Harvard Medical School Ophthalmology AI Lab. Closed a37 seed in ~4 days. Indian-origin. ~20 years old. San Francisco.

rohan-tibrewal.name: Rohan Tibrewal
rohan-tibrewal.one_liner: Cartesia (Member of Technical Staff), UC Berkeley (CS)

rohil-badkundri.name: Rohil Badkundri
tags: spike: co-author on ESM3 (Science cover, 98B params, 2.3k GitHub stars) + now building solo
rohil-badkundri.one_liner: Harvard '24 (graduated early, Applied Math & Economics). Co-author on ESM3: 98B-parameter protein language model published on the cover of
rohil-badkundri.urgency_reason: 'Building' stealth post-EvolutionaryScale → CZ Biohub acquisition. Pre-formation mode.
rohil-badkundri.next_action: Warm intro via Roshan Rao or direct; ref ESM3 clinical-trial angle

rohin-garg.name: Rohin Garg
rohin-garg.one_liner: IOI 2023 Gold (Rank 12/350 globally). Codeforces International Grandmaster (peak 2729, 2,490 problems solved). AI R&D Intern, Character.AI. MIT CS Class of 2029. 2x USACO Camp finalist, 2x USA IOI team. President of Monta Vista HS competitive programming club. Indian-origin (father: BITS Pilani → Oracle Sr. Director). Cupertino, CA. ~18.

rohin-manvi.name: Rohin Manvi
rohin-manvi.one_liner: Berkeley EECS PhD at BAIR (advised by Sergey Levine), Liquid AI Researcher

ronak-malde.name: Ronak Malde
ronak-malde.one_liner: Stealth founder (prev Google DeepMind, ~7 months). Trained SWE-1 at Windsurf from scratch — triggered a $2.4B Google acquisition. Stanford BS + MS CS. Exceptional Capital 100. Delta Fellow (listed as "Stealth, prev DeepMind"). Thesis: continual learning for self-improving coding agents. Left DeepMind after ~7 months, walking away from an estimated $7.5–22.5M in unvested equity. ~25. Greer, SC.

roshan-rao.name: Roshan Rao
tags: spike: co-invented protein language models; 4 seminal papers (TAPE, MSA Transformer, ESMFold, ESM3) across 6 years
roshan-rao.one_liner: Co-founder of EvolutionaryScale (ESM3, Science cover Jan 2025). Built the foundational protein language models at Meta FAIR — TAPE benchmark (NeurIPS 2019 Spotlight), MSA Transformer (ICML 2021, 470+ citations), ESMFold (Science 2023), ESM3 (98B params, Science 2025). PhD UC Berkeley (Pieter Abbeel + John Canny). Now Principal Research Scientist at CZ Biohub after $142M seed → CZI acquisition (Nov 2025). 11,400+ total citations. Indian-origin.
roshan-rao.urgency_reason: Post-EvolutionaryScale acquisition by CZ Biohub. Second-act watch in 12-24 months.
roshan-rao.next_action: Email ref ESM3 → what's next in protein foundation models

rushil-mathur.name: Rushil Mathur
rushil-mathur.one_liner: IMO 2024 Gold (India, rank ~29/609) — one of 4 Indian gold medalists in India's best-ever IMO performance (4th overall, 167 points). Oxford Math+CS (St John's College, started Oct 2024) —

sachit-menon.name: Sachit Menon
sachit-menon.one_liner: Columbia CS PhD, advised by Carl Vondrick

sally-zhu.name: Sally Zhu
sally-zhu.one_liner: Stanford Math + CS '27, Flapping Airplanes, Stanford NLP Group

samarth-goel.name: Samarth Goel
samarth-goel.one_liner: Harvey AI (prev. HRT, IMC, UC Berkeley)

sameer-gandhi.name: Sameer Gandhi
sameer-gandhi.one_liner: Partner at Accel (since 2008). Prev Sequoia Capital (1998–2008). Board: CrowdStrike (CRWD), Perplexity AI, Freshworks (FRSH), Mind Robotics. Portfolio includes Anthropic, Spotify, Dropbox, Flipkart, Venmo, Discord, Helsing. MIT BS/MS EE+CS, Stanford GSB MBA. Trustee, Stanford Business School Trust. Indian-American, from Maryland. ~25+ years in venture. Consumer/SaaS/cybersecurity/AI. LP prospect for inception-stage AI fund.
sameer-gandhi.urgency_reason: Meeting scheduled. Accel partner with Perplexity board + Anthropic + India bridge.
sameer-gandhi.next_action: Prep meeting — lead with Perplexity/Aravind connection + deal flow proof

samuel-stanton.name: Samuel Stanton
samuel-stanton.one_liner: Co-founder of Coefficient Bio, acquired by Anthropic for ~$400M in stock (April 2026). NYU PhD under Andrew Gordon Wilson. Built Genentech's "lab-in-the-loop" antibody design system — 3–100x binding improvements across 4 therapeutic targets. 12+ publications at NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, AISTATS. ~620+ citations. NDSEG Fellow. Now technical staff at Anthropic Health Care & Life Sciences. Thesis: AI-native autonomous scientific discovery for biopharma.

sandra-yang.name: Sandra Yang
sandra-yang.one_liner: Stanford University (Math + CS, Class of 2028), Khosla Ventures, incoming Ramp

serena-ge.name: Serena Ge
serena-ge.one_liner: Datacurve (Co-Founder & CEO), prev University of Waterloo

shivani-poddar.name: Shivani Poddar
shivani-poddar.one_liner: Founder, Stealth AI Startup (venture-backed) — building agentic AI for commerce.

shreyas-sreenivas.name: Shreyas Sreenivas
shreyas-sreenivas.one_liner: Founding Engineer at Exa ($700M valuation, $85M Series B led by Benchmark). Built Exa's billion-scale vector database from scratch in Rust with custom SIMD assembly optimizations — searches billions of 4,096-dim vectors in <100ms at >500 QPS. Powers search for Cursor, Lovable, Perplexity, Notion AI, Databricks, AWS. Exa revenue ~$12M ARR, ~13x YoY growth. Indian-origin (grew up in Bangalore). University of Waterloo BCS. Skills: Rust, CUDA, Go, distributed systems. ~24.

shri-kolanukuduru.name: Shri Kolanukuduru
shri-kolanukuduru.one_liner: Investing Partner at Category Ventures (Villi Iltchev's $160M Fund I, since Jan 2025). Backs deeply technical founders at pre-seed/seed in AI infra, dev tools, cybersecurity. Prev: Insight Partners (early-stage AI infra/dev-tools/sec, 2024–25), Pioneer (Daniel Gross accelerator — ML engineer + invested $20K/2% and $20K/1% flyout terms into day-0 founders), Simplify.jobs founding team (YC W21), and HFT quant trader. UNC Chapel Hill BS Applied Math + Physics, Carolina Scholar (top ~40 merit cohort, full ride), highest honors. Grew up between SF and Raleigh, NC. Crypto-native (shriyanshk.eth, writes on Mirror). Competitive poker. Hunts, snowboards, surfs.
shri-kolanukuduru.urgency_reason: Category Ventures pre-seed/seed. Natural follow-on partner. Engineer-founder thesis.
shri-kolanukuduru.next_action: Deal flow swap email — name 2 pre-seed founders he'd want to see

shubham-goel.name: Shubham Goel
tags: spike: IChO Silver Medal + JEE Advanced AIR 6/150K + Berkeley PhD (Malik) + built SOTA 3D human reconstruction system (1.6K stars)
shubham-goel.one_liner: IChO Silver Medalist (2014). JEE Advanced AIR 6 / 150K. IIT Bombay CSE (Honors), 9.63/10 GPA. Berkeley PhD under Jitendra Malik & Angjoo Kanazawa — thesis on high-fidelity 3D mesh reconstruction. Built HMR 2.0 / 4D-Humans (ICCV 2023, 1.6K GitHub stars, SOTA human reconstruction). 9 papers across ICCV, CVPR, ECCV, CAV, TACAS. ~1,100 citations. Facebook AI Research visiting researcher. IST Austria (Henzinger). Currently at xAI (per Google Scholar) / Avataar. Indian-origin. ~28.

sid-bharthulwar.name: Sid Bharthulwar
sid-bharthulwar.one_liner: Harvard Math + CS (prev. Bridgewater, Two Sigma)

sijun-tan.name: Sijun Tan
sijun-tan.one_liner: Berkeley EECS PhD (Raluca Ada Popa, Sky Lab). Project lead of rLLM — the open-source RL post-training framework with 5,300+ GitHub stars, 60 contributors, and 2M+ HuggingFace downloads. Built DeepScaleR-1.5B (beats o1-preview on AIME), DeepCoder-14B (matches o3-mini on LiveCodeBench), and DeepSWE (59% SWE-Bench Verified, SOTA for open-weight agents). ~1,140 citations. Co-leads Agentica Project with Michael Luo (who just left for stealth startup). Collaborating with Together AI. Effectively running a proto-startup from inside the lab. Chinese-origin (Guangzhou).

simon-guo.name: Simon Guo
simon-guo.one_liner: Stanford CS PhD (started 2024), prev UC Berkeley EECS

sonya-jin.name: Sonya Jin
sonya-jin.one_liner: Phinity (Co-founder), Stanford University (BS CS — AI track, 2022-2025)

spruce-campbell.name: Spruce Campbell
spruce-campbell.one_liner: Physics undergrad at MIT (graduating 2026) who led the Mantis AI research project at Kellis Lab / CSAIL — now spun out as a company with Prof. Manolis Kellis (230+ papers, 115K+ citations). 2x OpenAI intern (Summer 2024, Summer 2025 — healthcare focus). BAFTA Young Game Designer winner at age 12. Shipped Operator 41 as an Apple Arcade launch title at age 14. Writing software since age 8. MIT varsity rifle — 3x CRCA Scholar All-American. Prod Cohort 4 (MIT startup incubator, 19 YC acceptances from 37 teams). Runs Driftwood, an SF group house / builder collective. ~20 years old. British, from East Sussex / London.

stephen-mcaleer.name: Stephen McAleer
stephen-mcaleer.one_liner: Anthropic (Alignment Science team), PhD UC Irvine, postdoc CMU

stephen-xie.name: Stephen Xie
stephen-xie.one_liner: UC Berkeley (EECS & Business, M.E.T. Program), Berkeley NLP Group

stuart-sul.name: Stuart Sul
stuart-sul.one_liner: Cursor (Anysphere) ML Engineer, Stanford MS CS (Hazy Research)

sudarshan-nambiar.name: Sudarshan Nambiar
sudarshan-nambiar.one_liner: Founding Engineer at Conway — AI-powered decision support automating fraud, AML, and security operations for fintechs. $7M seed from Kleiner Perkins + First Round Capital, with Chris Ré (Stanford/Factory) as angel investor. Purdue CS senior (CompE, AI + distributed systems focus). Neo Scholar Finalist. Indian-origin (Kerala/Nambiar). ~10 employees, SF-based. Previously Meta, Anon (USV-backed). Published ML security research (ACM/IEEE ISLPED 2024). ~22.

sujay-jayakar.name: Sujay Jayakar
tags: spike: math-first autodidact who became one of the best systems engineers of his generation without formal CS training
sujay-jayakar.one_liner: Head of Engineering (Infrastructure), Cursor. Co-founder & Chief Scientist, Convex ($53.5M, a16z). Ex-Dropbox Principal Engineer — led Nucleus sync engine rewrite (Python → Rust, hundreds of millions of users). SOSP 2021. Microsoft Research (Demikernel, 30 Gbps/core). Cornell Math + Econ '12 (no CS degree). Interviewed at Dropbox in Haskell as a math major. Munster, Indiana. ~32.

sukjun-hwang.name: Sukjun (June) Hwang
tags: spike: H-Net 1st author + Hydra w/ Tri Dao + Albert Gu PhD — the architecture engine of the post-Transformer SSM lineage
sukjun-hwang.urgency_reason: CMU mid-PhD under Albert Gu. Tri Dao reference class. Architecture frontier.
sukjun-hwang.next_action: Cold email ref H-Net robustness gap (42.8 vs 22.2) + EMA smoothing trick

suvansh-sanjeev.name: Suvansh Sanjeev
suvansh-sanjeev.one_liner: Researcher at OpenAI — Applications Research Team (reasoning models beyond math/coding + early robotics). CMU Robotics MS (Zico Kolter + Zac Manchester), left PhD. UC Berkeley EECS BS 2020 (Sergey Levine + Claire Tomlin at BAIR). Founded Brilliantly AI (open-source AI tools). Credited on GPT-4.1, GPT-5, gpt-oss. National Merit Semifinalist. Indian-origin, raised Bellevue WA. ~27.

takeru-miyato.name: Takeru Miyato
takeru-miyato.one_liner: Inventor of Spectral Normalization for GANs (ICLR 2018 Oral, ~4,700 citations) and Virtual Adversarial Training (IEEE TPAMI 2019). PhD student at University of Tübingen (Andreas Geiger) + co-advised by Max Welling (Amsterdam). Part-time researcher at Preferred Networks since 2016. Google Brain intern under Ian Goodfellow + Andrew M. Dai (2016). 2× ICLR Oral author (2018 Spectral Norm, 2025 Artificial Kuramoto Oscillatory Neurons). Kyoto University BE + MS. ~15K Google Scholar citations. Japanese.

thijs-simonian.name: Thijs Simonian
thijs-simonian.one_liner: Employee #5 at LMArena/Arena (now $1.7B, $150M Series A led by Felicis + a16z). Created Video Arena — the largest generative video evaluation platform (200K+ preference votes, 15 frontier models). Built Truth or Dare, a Discord bot with 500K MAU across 1.6M communities (~16M users). Earned $100K bug bounty for discovering a major security vulnerability. Co-directed TreeHacks 2026 ($500K in prizes, 1,000+ hackers). Stanford CS. Previously interned at a16z and Discord (youngest employee, hired in high school). ~21. San Francisco.

welton-wang.name: Welton Wang
welton-wang.one_liner: OpenAI (Member of Technical Staff), Stanford CS

xingjian-bai.name: Xingjian Bai
xingjian-bai.one_liner: MIT CS PhD (1st year), advised by Kaiming He, prev Oxford (Math + CS)

yassine-kachrad.name: Yassine Kachrad
yassine-kachrad.one_liner: Jane Street (incoming SWE), prev. CMU MSCS, EPFL

yuandong-tian.name: Yuandong Tian
tags: spike: theoretician-builder who has been at the frontier of 4 distinct AI waves — vision, game AI, SSL theory, LLM reasoning
yuandong-tian.one_liner: Co-founder, Recursive (stealth). 11 years at Meta FAIR as Research Scientist Director. 22K+ citations. Built DarkForest Go (concurrent with AlphaGo) and ELF OpenGo (first open-source AI to beat pros 20-0). StreamingLLM (1.1K citations), GaLore, Coconut (continuous latent reasoning). ICML Outstanding Paper HM. ICCV Marr Prize HM. CMU Robotics PhD. SJTU. Rejected OpenAI/Nvidia/DeepMind to start company. Published sci-fi novelist. Shanghai. ~42.

zeeshan-patel.name: Zeeshan Patel
tags: spike: built the #3-ranked video model in the world from scratch at 22, generating 1.245B videos/month
zeeshan-patel.one_liner: Stealth founder. Built Grok Imagine from scratch in 3 months — 1.245B videos/month, ranked #3 globally on Artificial Analysis Arena (ELO 1,333). First hire on xAI's video team. Previously NVIDIA Research: Tech Lead on NeMo VFM pipeline (first author, 29 co-authors), co-authored Cosmos world model (NYT/WSJ/BBC). Berkeley EECS MS (Efros + Malik). CVPR 2025. 461 citations. Delta Fellow. Indian-origin. Fremont, CA. ~22.

zeyneb-kaya.name: Zeyneb Kaya
zeyneb-kaya.one_liner: Co-Founder/CTO of Topological (YC S25) — physics-based foundation models for CAD optimization. UToP-v1 is 1930x faster than conventional finite element methods with <5% compliance error. Regeneron Science Talent Search 5th place ($90K). Won 1st at Etched x Mercor x Cognition Hackathon ($40K) AND Pear VC x Anthropic Hackathon ("Most Impressive Technical Feat"). 1st place TreeHacks 2025. Coca-Cola Scholar (150 / 103,000+). Stanford CS + Physics + Math. Founded Romeyka Everlasting (endangered language preservation). Research at Stanford AI Lab (RL, diffusion LLMs), Dria (decentralized LLM infra). Turkish-origin. ~19. Saratoga, CA.

zhening-li.name: Zhening Li
zhening-li.one_liner: MIT CS PhD at CSAIL (advised by Armando Solar-Lezama)
